uses: Draconia pycnorrhiza, also known as the "Dragon Tree," has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. Its sap has been used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The resin extracted from the tree has been used to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. Additionally, the sap has been used to treat wounds and cuts due to its antimicrobial properties, which help to prevent infection. Research is ongoing to explore the full potential of Draconia pycnorrhiza's medicinal properties.
